title: stemonurus perobtusus
side_effects: Stemonurus perobtusus can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to cardiovascular problems, including rapid heart rate and increased blood pressure. Additionally, improper use of stemonurus perobtusus has been linked to allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, hives, and difficulty breathing. In severe cases, it can cause neurological damage, resulting in headaches, dizziness, and even loss of motor function.
